name_en: Top-tier Original Replica Exclusive Real Shot 📷 M83365
name_cn:
Top-tier Original Replica Exclusive Real Shot 📷 M83365
The exquisite embossed Monogram pattern is highlighted, reinterpreted with pink Monogram Unplant leather, creating the exclusive 'Portefeuille Lisa' for this season. A compact wallet that fits neatly into bags and pockets, it has multiple pockets and card slots, and the coin pocket is decorated with a pull tab featuring the LV circle.
Size: 9 x 11.5 x 1.5 cm
